title: sterculia oblongata
intro: Sterculia oblongata, also known as the Burdock, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sterculia oblongata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
